Check Out Every Pokémon TCG Product Release in June 2026

Here are the Pokémon Trading Card Game products launching this month.

Scarlet & Violet—Chaos Rising Elite Trainer Box

Available June 19, 2026. MSRP: $59.99.

Scarlet & Violet—Chaos Rising Booster Bundle

A bundle of six booster packs. $26.99.

Scarlet & Violet—Chaos Rising Booster Display Box

36 booster packs.

  • First Partner Illustration Collection (Tin) — $24.99
  • Chaos Rising Three-Pack Blister — $13.99
  • Chaos Rising Premium Collection — $49.99

Pokémon Scarlet & Violet Nintendo Switch Video Game

Not a TCG product. $59.99.

Pikachu Plush

A cuddly plush figure. $19.99.

Pokémon TCG Collector Pin

An enamel pin. $9.99.
